expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: single embedding component planning covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, and regression-sensitive integration states
expectations.evidence: The deliverable explicitly scopes and structures coverage around all three required focus areas. In “4a.1 Scope & Objective” it lists: (1) “Panel-stack composition”, (2) “Embedding lifecycle”, and (3) “Regression-sensitive integration states”. It then provides dedicated sections “4a.3 Panel-Stack Composition Coverage”, “4a.4 Embedding Lifecycle Coverage”, and “4a.5 Regression-Sensitive Integration States”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The document is explicitly labeled and organized as a phase4a planning deliverable: header states “Primary phase under test: phase4a” and “Phase 4a Deliverable: Component Stack QA Planning (Single Embedding Component)”. It is planning-focused (test scenarios, checkpoints, minimal test set, entry/exit criteria) rather than execution or defect analysis, matching phase4a intent.
